metric_definitions.weighted_asp: SUM(valid Total_Value_USD) / SUM(valid Quantity); NULL when volume is zero
metric_definitions.precision_compliance: A deterministic rules-compliance proxy, not statistical precision.
metric_definitions.recall_proxy: A deterministic risk-inventory proxy, not statistical recall. Human labels are required for statistical recall.

stages.input_population: Every physical row after the source header in the declared complete CSV/TSV source, or an explicitly governed uncapped legacy migration.
stages.predicate_description: Required columns exist and the observed row count equals the independently counted source rows. Capped Excel input is rejected.
Evaluate configured HS4 eligibility. Current production MATCH_ALL_HS4 semantics allow every HS4 to continue; HS exclusions remain observable rule hits.
Suppress dental-only phrases from surgical family/category candidate generation unless an independent surgical signal is present.
Match reference family/model phrases, then rerank overlapping candidates by phrase quality, HS context, product evidence, and conflict controls.

stages.input_population: Rows without an accepted family match plus matched rows requiring conflict checks.
stages.predicate_description: Use category phrases only when stronger family evidence is absent; negative, accessory-only, veterinary, dental, ophthalmic/imaging and other conflict cues can suppress or send the candidate to Review.

stages.input_population: Rows without accepted family/category product evidence.
stages.predicate_description: Recognized manufacturer aliases may provide a non-standard manufacturer tier. The mapping is retained in SQLite even when it is not Trusted.

stages.input_population: Rows with any proposed mapped dimension.
stages.predicate_description: Canonicalize manufacturer, family, segment, sub-segment and product labels without changing the source text or stable row identifier.
The standardized Segment × Sub-segment × Product tuple must exist in the governed surgical master before it can be Trusted.
Apply governed exclusion/scope lists and product evidence requirements. Whitelist or independent surgical evidence may recover a suppressed candidate.

stages.input_population: Rows with generic/product tokens or anomaly flags.
stages.predicate_description: Date/month tokens, APT/March collisions, generic terms, high-risk tokens and vector auto-mapping anomalies prevent unsupported promotion and remain reviewable.

stages.input_population: Rows using Extended-HS evidence or carrying an Extended-HS false-positive flag.
stages.predicate_description: Extended-HS may add candidate evidence but cannot override stronger negative, reference, scope or anomaly controls.

stages.input_population: Product-less manufacturer or unmatched rows for which a governed HS × manufacturer prior exists.
stages.predicate_description: Recover a candidate product from the governed HS × manufacturer prior without overriding a stronger lexical hit. The hs_prior tier remains visible even when not Trusted.

stages.input_population: Every mapped or risk-flagged row before terminal routing.
stages.predicate_description: Apply evidence, master, reference, generic, ophthalmic/imaging and vector guards. MRI-compatible text is inventoried as a recall risk; it is not auto-promoted in this review-only release.

stages.input_population: Every extracted row after all applicable candidate stages.
stages.predicate_description: Route exactly once: Trusted only when current production gates pass; Review for unresolved or auditable candidates; Excluded otherwise. Review and Excluded remain distinct.

stages.input_population: SQLite aggregates and the governed 150-row review sample only.
stages.predicate_description: Export aggregate roll-ups and review samples to Excel. Complete row-level data and inventories remain in SQLite; no RawData or decision-log worksheet is created.
